title: 👤 Personal Service
lead: Personal service is carried out by SAC operators in inbound contact situations.

ura.title: Calls transferred by electronic service
ura.text: Clients who call through the IVRs (Interactive Voice Response) and are directed to SAC when they select the option to speak with an attendant.

interfone.title: Parking Intercom
interfone.text: Clients who activate the intercom for support at the exits of the Parking lots attended by SAC.

focus.title: Operator Focus
focus.item4: Immediate forwarding according to the type of occurrence

examples.title: Forwarding Examples
examples.text: Duplicate purchase payments, access problems to apps and sites, complaints about service or product quality, among others.

highlight.title: Importance
highlight.text: It is an essential channel for agility and for the customer's perception of on-site support.

q1.text: Question: What is the main differentiator of personal service?

options.c: Agility and perception of on-site support

q1.feedback: Correct! Personal service is essential to provide a personalized, agile, welcoming, and satisfactory approach for the client.
